creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
When building devel/kdebindings4-ruby with lang/ruby19 installed, the port fails to build/install the krossruby.so library.

Fix: 

Unknown.  Cmake is not detecting something correctly when ruby19 is installed.
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/lang/ruby19
# make install
# cd /usr/ports/devel/kdebindings4-ruby
# make install
# pkg_info -d `make -V PKGNAME`
Information for ruby19-kdebindings-4.5.5:

Mismatched Checksums:
pkg_info: /usr/local/kde4/lib/kde4/krossruby.so doesn't exist
